STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT_POWER.description: Gain one of two powerful effects this combat.

STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.description: Creatures with Embers take damage equal to the stack when [gold]Blaze[/gold] is triggered and then lose half the stack.
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.smartDescripti: Upon triggering [gold]Blaze[/gold] takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage, then reduce [gold]Blaze[/gold] by half (rounded up).
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.title: Embers
STS2CHARTEST-JUST_THE_TIP_POWER.descript: For the first Attack played each turn, gain Heat equal to half the damage dealt.
STS2CHARTEST-JUST_THE_TIP_POWER.smartDes: For the next {Amount:cond:>1?[blue]{}[/blue] Attacks|Attack} played, gain [gold]Heat[/gold] equal to half the damage dealt.
STS2CHARTEST-JUST_THE_TIP_POWER.title: Just The Tip
STS2CHARTEST-MELTING_POINT_POWER.smartDe: Take double damage from [gold]Embers[/gold] for {Amount:plural:this turn|the next {} turns}.
STS2CHARTEST-MELTING_POINT_POWER.title: Melting Point
